name: vid_extract_frame
description: Extract one video frame as a PNG. args: {video (sandbox-relative path), timeSec?: number, frameIndex?: integer} (exactly one of timeSec/frameIndex; timeSec is rounded to the nearest decoded frame using the video's fps). Returns {framePath, width, height, frameIndex}. Use this before vid_ground_text or vid_segment — they need a still image, not a video.
